key_insight: Combinatorial optimization provides a unifying framework for making machine learning systems more trustworthy by enabling formal guarantees for interpretability, robustness, fairness, privacy, and certification.
engineering_relevance: For deployed ML pipelines, CO-based methods can support model selection, auditing, and certification with explicit trade-off control beyond standard gradient-driven training.
method: Formulate trustworthiness goals as optimization or certification problems.
Use CO to generate interpretable models, explanations, and compression schemes.
Apply CO for robustness analysis, fairness auditing, and privacy attacks/protections.
evidence_signal: This is a survey synthesizing recent advances across training and post-training tasks rather than presenting a single new dataset or benchmark.
watch_item: Scalability remains a key limitation, so exact or certification-oriented CO methods may require hybrid solvers or approximations in large-scale settings.
paper_title: Trustworthy Machine Learning through the Lens of Combinatorial Optimization: Survey and Research Perspectives
